description_long: This is a black pickup truck with a sleek, modern design, featuring a double cab and a spacious open cargo bed at the rear. The body is primarily composed of smooth, glossy metal panels with chrome accents on the wheels and front grille. The front end displays a prominent grille with a gold Chevrolet bowtie emblem, flanked by rectangular headlights and a robust bumper. The side profile reveals two passenger doors, silver door handles, and large alloy wheels with low-profile tires. The rear view shows the open cargo bed with visible ridges and a tailgate, as well as red tail lights integrated into the rear fenders. The windows are tinted, and the overall build suggests durability and utility for urban or suburban environments.
description: A glossy black double-cab pickup truck with a spacious open cargo bed, chrome wheels, and a prominent Chevrolet grille emblem.
description_view_0: Side view showing the double cab, two doors, chrome wheels, and the open cargo bed.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the open cargo bed, tailgate, and red tail lights.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with similar features as view 0, showing the cab, doors, and cargo bed.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the grille with the Chevrolet emblem, headlights, and bumper.
